root_text.an8.118:1.3: Sammādiṭṭhi, sammāsaṅkappo, sammāvācā, sammākammanto, sammāājīvo, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati, sammāsamādhi—
root_text.an8.118:1.4: rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime aṭṭha dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an8.118:1.1: “For insight into greed, eight things should be developed.
translation_text.an8.118:1.3: Right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, and right immersion.
translation_text.an8.118:1.4: For insight into greed, these eight things should be developed.”
